rationale: Educ. Code §7.006 governs coordination of student performance records between TEA and THECB. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions and contains no provision affected by changing the §11.13(b) exemption amount.
quote: Sec. 7.006. COORDINATION OF RECORDS. The commissioner of education and the commissioner of higher education shall ensure that records relating to student performance held by the Texas Education Agency and the Texas Higher Education Coordinating Board are coordinated and maintained in standardized, compatible formats that permit:
_note: No relationship between this statute and the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase.
